subject: ts_template_match cant link tomograms
body:
Hi all, 

When starting template matching with command 











*WarpTools ts_template_match \--settings warp_tiltseries.settings 
\--tomo_angpix 12.56 \--tomo_directory tiltseries/reconstruction 
\--template_path templates/ref_gap_inv_21.mrc \--template_angpix 12.56 
\--template_diameter 410 \--peak_distance 100 \--npeaks 2000 
\--subdivisions 3 \--lowpass 0.7 \--subvolume_size 64 *

I get this error that appear to come from the script attempt to create a 
link to tomograms on the top of tomogram files:
"Using alternative input specified by --input_data
File search will be relative to /mnt/backup/ok/nl208/data/warp
10 files found
Parsing previous results for each item, if available...
10/10, previous metadata found for 0                                       
                                                                            
                                                                     

*Both --input_processing and --output_processing are set, attempting to 
link tomograms from 
/mnt/backup/ok/nl208/data/warp/tiltseries/reconstruction to 
/mnt/backup/ok/nl208/data/warp/tiltseries/reconstruction...Unhandled 
exception. System.Exception: reconstruction directory exists and is not a 
symbolic link, cannot replace*
   at WarpTools.Commands.TemplateMatchTiltseries.Run(Object options) in 
/mnt/d2/software/warp/WarpTools/Commands/Tiltseries/TemplateMatchTiltseries.cs:line 
180..."

How to fix this problem?

Thank you and best, 

Oleksiy
